name: Frosted Pumpkin-Walnut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the brown sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Stir in the pumpkin and flavorings.
5. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and pumpkin pie spice.
6. Gradually add to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
7. Stir in the walnuts.
8. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes.
10. Cool on wire racks.
11. Frost with Maple Frosting.
Maple Frosting:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add 1 cup powdered sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add remaining sugar alternately with milk, beating until smooth enough to spread.
4. Add maple extract and beat well.
